channel.title: Web3 browser on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Web3 browser on Tech Tracker

item.title: Decentr - First Web3 browser to sell browsing data and earn money.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-tvkVMyvmRL0/Yq4P69_XJvI/AAAAAAAAL9w/pFHHMubqsLIHv4Q7F8BxFlj1kVei2WUKQCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1655574502928245-0.png" alt=""> Internet is digital technology also known as world wide web is publicly released in year 1991 by Tim Berners Lee which previously used for US military operations where you can publish your digital website and blogs by hosting them on your computer or any cloud server and then once published you can open them using search engines like Google through supported browsers. We so far seen two versions of internet, Web1.
